prompt:
Hellow, you are not alone! So many students have the same problem, and me to. 
    In first semester it was wery big problem for me. But now I have some ideas how can I fix it. I will give you them.

1) You need to have some task-management system. In that system you can prioritize your tasks.

2) You study in uni, so you have some classes. Use "Google Calendar" to manage them.

3) Combine similar tasks - then you will do all tasks faster.

4) Remember to get enouth sleep and to do sport well, cause it can bust your productivity.

    I hope that some of my tips can help you.

messages.content:
You are an expert English language examiner.
    Evaluate the student's text based on the official CEFR scale.

    # SCORING RUBRIC:
    - A1/A2 (Basic): Simple sentences, limited vocabulary. Errors are expected.
    - B1/B2 (Independent): Can express complex ideas. Grammar errors are allowed if they don't block meaning.
    - C1/C2 (Proficient): Flexible language use, wide vocabulary. Occasional minor slips are allowed.

    # CRITICAL INSTRUCTIONS:
    1. FOCUS ON VOCABULARY AND COMPLEXITY. Do not give a low score just because of a few grammar mistakes if the vocabulary is advanced.
    2. A text with complex sentences and good idioms should be B2 or C1, even with some errors.
    3. Do NOT default to A2. Look for reasons to give a HIGHER score.
    4. Return result ONLY as a JSON object.

    # JSON STRUCTURE:
    {
        "cefr_level": "str (EXACTLY ONE from: A1, A2, B1, B2, C1, C2)",
        "grammar_score": "float (0.0-1.0)",
        "corrections": ["list of strings"],
        "feedback": "str"
    }

STUDENT_TEXT: i have a dog. he name is Bob. i very like play with him. table sky because run yesterday.
TEXT_TYPE: essay

Hard rule applied: the unclear span is labeled only as Incomprehensibility. Task achievement is NC because TASK is missing in the input.", "next_steps": ["Practice possessive determiners (my/your/his/her).", "Practice verb patterns after like/love/hate (+ -ing).", "Write complete subject-verb clauses so each sentence remains interpretable."]}

TASK: Explain two advantages of the internet for students.
STUDENT_TEXT: On the one hand, internet is good. We can decide many problems online. Im happy.
TEXT_TYPE: essay

TASK: Describe a plan that changed and explain the final outcome.
STUDENT_TEXT: Ideally, we should have go to the park, but it was raining. Nevertheless, the atmosphere was overload with joy.
TEXT_TYPE: essay
TEXTINSPECTOR_LEVEL: B1+

TASK: Give practical time-management advice to classmates.
STUDENT_TEXT: You should organise your week. Write down all deadlines and allocate time for tasks per day. To sum up, set priorities and keep in mind that everyone got same time. It appears that procrastination undermines productivity.
TEXT_TYPE: essay
FLESCH_KINCAID: 10.4

TASK: Discuss whether authorities underestimate a social crisis.
STUDENT_TEXT: It appears that the government tends to underestimate the severity of the crisis. Seldom have we seen such negligence. This may indicate a systemic failure.
TEXT_TYPE: essay

TASK: Write a persuasive formal paragraph on environmental responsibility.
STUDENT_TEXT: We must not ignore the environmental issues lest we face irreversible consequences. Is it not our duty to preserve the planet? We observe a stark contrast: technological triumph vs moral decay.
TEXT_TYPE: essay

TASK: You read this post in the Telegram chat of first year students: It is so difficult to study in university! I don't have any free time at all! Write an answer to this post (10 sentences) and give some tips on how to organise your days to have more free time.
STUDENT_TEXT:     Hellow, you are not alone! So many students have the same problem, and me to. 
    In first semester it was wery big problem for me. But now I have some ideas how can I fix it. I will give you them.

1) You need to have some task-management system. In that system you can prioritize your tasks.

2) You study in uni, so you have some classes. Use "Google Calendar" to manage them.

3) Combine similar tasks - then you will do all tasks faster.

4) Remember to get enouth sleep and to do sport well, cause it can bust your productivity.

    I hope that some of my tips can help you. 
TEXT_TYPE: essay
